releaseNotes: Fixed Movies and TV Shows freezing while the grid populated - large catalogs (tens of thousands of titles for some providers) now load in small windows instead of all at once, which is what was choking Firestick-class hardware. Fixed the TV Guide showing garbled, overlapping program titles on some channels - overlapping schedule entries from the provider are now cleaned up so only one clean title shows per time slot. Fixed Multi-Screen freezing or silently getting stuck on one box while the other kept playing, and a visual glitch where the two videos bled into each other - both boxes now recover automatically from playback hiccups instead of freezing, and use a leaner buffer profile so two simultaneous streams don't compound memory/network pressure on constrained hardware. Added a Record button to each Multi-Screen box. Long-press any program in the Guide to set a reminder that switches to that channel automatically (or just notifies you) when it starts.
